title: QB Performance
description: A client side fabric PvP + FPS modpack!
body:
**QB Performance-Pack** is a **Fabric**, **client-side only** modpack built mainly for **PvP**, focusing on **maximum FPS**, **low latency**, and **clean visibility**.
It improves performance, reduces stutter, and speeds up loading times to keep gameplay smooth in intense fights.
The pack enhances visuals while staying vanilla-friendly, making enemies, animations, and effects clearer without adding distraction.
Customizable HUD and UI mods provide essential combat information like health, effects, armor, and cooldowns at a glance.
PvP-focused quality-of-life features improve movement, inventory handling, key feedback, and overall responsiveness.
Everything is fully client-side, works on any server, and is highly configurable, making QB Performance-Pack ideal for competitive PvP players who want a fast, clean, and reliable Minecraft experience.
